name: HRT_QUALIFIERS_VL
query: SELECT Q.QUALIFIER_ID, Q.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, QTL.DESCRIPTION, Q.QUALIFIER_SET_ID, Q.QUALIFIER_CODE, Q.QUALIFIER_SEQ_NUMBER, Q.EMP_VIEW_FLAG, Q.EMP_DEF_FLAG, Q.MGR_VIEW_FLAG, Q.MGR_DEF_FLAG, Q.SEARCH_FLAG, Q.MODULE_ID, Q.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, Q.CREATED_BY, Q.CREATION_DATE, Q.LAST_UPDATED_BY, Q.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, Q.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HRT_QUALIFIERS_B Q, HRT_QUALIFIERS_TL QTL WHERE Q.QUALIFIER_ID = QTL.QUALIFIER_ID AND Q.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = QTL.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND QTL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
